channel.title: Azure on Elkana Lang'at
channel.description: Recent content in Azure on Elkana Lang'at

item.title: Least-Privilege IAM Patterns: From Theory to Practice
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: A comprehensive guide to implementing least-privilege IAM across cloud platforms, covering policy design patterns, common pitfalls, and practical checklists.

item.title: Zero Trust Azure Landing Zone
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Designed and deployed a Zero Trust network architecture for Azure cloud platform serving 300+ users, implementing microsegmentation, identity-based access, and continuous verification.

item.title: Microsoft Azure Data Fundamentals (DP-900)
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Microsoft certification demonstrating foundational knowledge of core data concepts and Azure data services.

item.title: Microsoft Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900)
item.author: elkanahlangatt@gmail.com (Elkana Lang'at)
item.description: Microsoft certification demonstrating foundational knowledge of Azure cloud services, core solutions, and management tools.
